signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**

The most significant breaking news is the **SEC's decision to drop its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs**, which has directly catalyzed XRP's recent price surge[1]. This regulatory resolution removes a major legal overhang that had suppressed XRP's price for years[1].

Following this announcement, XRP has gained nearly 10%
